---
title: "Evaluation of Peri-Implantitis through Fourier-Transform Infrared Spectroscopy on Saliva"
date: 2025-02-07
author:
  - name: Parize, Graziele
  - name: Luana Jimenez, Gabrielle
  - name: Shibli, Jamil Awad
  - name: Siroma, Rafael
  - name: Caetano, Matheus Willian
  - name: Kim, Yeon Jung
  - name: Braz-Silva, Paulo Henrique
  - name: Da Silva Martinho, Herculano
  - name: Pallos, Debora
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Journal of Proteome Research"
  volume: 24
  issue: 2
  doi: "10.1021/acs.jproteome.4c00707"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Evaluation of Peri-Implantitis through Fourier-Transform Infrared Spectroscopy on Saliva</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
